name: Ludo Hero
author: Poki
description: Ludo Hero is based on the classic Ludo board game. This online version of Ludo was created by MarketJS to revive the old days when you still played a game at the table. Come on and throw the dice to get all your pawns inside your box after making a round across the board. How to play: Use your mouse to navigate through the game. About the creator: Ludo Hero was created by MarketJS. They have also created Math Trivia Live on Poki.
